name: science-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at Science (AAAS), the flagship multidisciplinary journal.

plugins.name: science-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Science manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, scope/significance fit, advance framing, abstract + one-sentence summary, main-text writing, display items, statistics & reproducibility, data/materials/code availability, reference style, cover letter, submission preflight, and reviewer rebuttal.
